species: We generated cDNA libraries from RNA extracted from epithelial cells from prostate (HPEpiC) and ovary (HOSEpiC)...
cell_type: Identification of HMGB1 interacting proteins in prostate epithelial cells by co-immunoprecipitation...
disease_state: High Mobility Group B (HMGB) proteins are involved in cancer progression and in cellular responses to platinum compounds used in the chemotherapy of prostate and ovary cancer.
sample_source: Healthy ovarian tissue obtained after biopsy was used for RNA extraction...
cell_line: The identification of HMGB1 associated proteins based on co-immunoprecipitation and MS analysis was carried out in the non-cancerous, immortalized prostate epithelial cell line PNT2...
